00003  *   gabriele.svelto@gmail.com                                             *
00004  *                                                                         *
00005  *   This file is part of Jelatine.                                        *
00006  *                                                                         *

00012  *   Jelatine is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,           *
00013  *   but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of        *

00015  *   GNU General Public License for more details.                          *

00018  *   along with Jelatine.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.     *
00019  ***************************************************************************/
00020 
00024 #include "wrappers.h"
00025 
00026 #include "class.h"
00027 #include "constantpool.h"
00028 #include "opcodes.h"
00029 #include "print.h"
00030 #include "thread.h"
00031 #include "vm.h"
00032 
00033 #if JEL_PRINT
00034 
00039 void print_method_call(thread_t *thread, const method_t *method)
00040 {
00041     if (!opts_get_print_methods()) {
00042         return;
00043     }
00044 
00045     for (int i = 0; i < thread->call_depth; i++) {
00046         fprintf(stderr, "    ");
00047     }
00048 
00049     fprintf(stderr, "CALL %s.%s:%s\n", cp_get_class(method->cp)->name,
00050                                        method->name, method->descriptor);
00051     thread->call_depth++;
00052 } // print_method_call()
00053 
00058 void print_method_ret(thread_t *thread, const method_t *method)
00059 {
00060     if (!opts_get_print_methods()) {
00061         return;
00062     }
00063 
00064     thread->call_depth--;
00065 
00066     for (int i = 0; i < thread->call_depth; i++) {
00067         fprintf(stderr, "    ");
00068     }
00069 
00070     fprintf(stderr, "RET %s.%s:%s\n", cp_get_class(method->cp)->name,
00071             method->name, method->descriptor);
00072 } // print_method_ret()
00073 
00078 void print_method_unwind(thread_t *thread, method_t *method)
00079 {
00080     if (!opts_get_print_methods()) {
00081         return;
00082     }
00083 
00084     if (thread->call_depth > 0) {
00085         thread->call_depth--;
00086     }
00087 
00088     for (int i = 0; i < thread->call_depth; i++) {
00089         fprintf(stderr, "    ");
00090     }
00091 
00092     fprintf(stderr, "UNWIND %s.%s:%s\n", cp_get_class(method->cp)->name,
00093             method->name, method->descriptor);
00094 } // print_method_unwind()
00095 
00101 void print_bytecode(thread_t *thread, const uint8_t *pc, const_pool_t *cp)
00102 {
00103     if (!opts_get_print_opcodes()) {
00104         return;
00105     }
00106 
00107     switch (*pc) {
00108         case NOP:
00109             fprintf(stderr, "NOP\n");
00110             break;
00111 
00112         case ACONST_NULL:
00113             fprintf(stderr, "ACONST_NULL\n");
00114             break;
00115 
00116         case ICONST_M1:
00117             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_M1\n");
00118             break;
00119 
00120         case ICONST_0:
00121             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_0\n");
00122             break;
00123 
00124         case ICONST_1:
00125             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_1\n");
00126             break;
00127 
00128         case ICONST_2:
00129             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_2\n");
00130             break;
00131 
00132         case ICONST_3:
00133             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_3\n");
00134             break;
00135 
00136         case ICONST_4:
00137             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_4\n");
00138             break;
00139 
00140         case ICONST_5:
00141             fprintf(stderr, "ICONST_5\n");
00142             break;
00143 
00144         case LCONST_0:
00145             fprintf(stderr, "LCONST_0\n");
00146             break;
00147 
00148         case LCONST_1:
00149             fprintf(stderr, "LCONST_1\n");
00150             break;
00151 
00152         case FCONST_0:
00153             fprintf(stderr, "FCONST_0\n");
00154             break;
00155 
00156         case FCONST_1:
00157             fprintf(stderr, "FCONST_1\n");
00158             break;
00159 
00160         case FCONST_2:
00161             fprintf(stderr, "FCONST_2\n");
00162             break;
00163 
00164         case DCONST_0:
00165             fprintf(stderr, "DCONST_0\n");
00166             break;
00167 
00168         case DCONST_1:
00169             fprintf(stderr, "DCONST_1\n");
00170             break;
00171 
00172         case BIPUSH:
00173             fprintf(stderr, "BIPUSH byte = %d\n",
00174                     (int32_t) *((int8_t *) (pc + 1)));
00175             break;
00176 
00177         case SIPUSH:
00178             fprintf(stderr, "SIPUSH short = %d\n",
00179                     (int32_t) load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00180             break;
00181 
00182         case LDC:
00183             if (cp_get_tag(cp, *(pc + 1)) == CONSTANT_Integer) {
00184                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC index = %u value = %d\n", *(pc + 1),
00185                         cp_get_integer(cp, *(pc + 1)));
00186             } else {
00187                  fprintf(stderr, "LDC index = %u value = %f\n", *(pc + 1),
00188                         cp_get_float(cp, *(pc + 1)));
00189             }
00190             break;
00191 
00192         case LDC_W:
00193             if (cp_get_tag(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)) == CONSTANT_Integer) {
00194                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC_W index = %u value = %d\n",
00195                         load_uint16_un(pc + 1),
00196                         cp_get_integer(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)));
00197             } else {
00198                  fprintf(stderr, "LDC_W index = %u value = %f\n",
00199                         load_uint16_un(pc + 1),
00200                         cp_get_float(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)));
00201             }
00202             break;
00203 
00204         case LDC2_W:
00205             if (cp_get_tag(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)) == CONSTANT_Long) {
00206 #if SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00207                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC2_W index = %u value = %ld\n",
00208                         load_uint16_un(pc + 1),
00209                         cp_get_long(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)));
00210 #else
00211                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC2_W index = %u value = %lld\n",
00212                         load_uint16_un(pc + 1),
00213                         cp_get_long(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)));
00214 #endif // SIZEOF_LONG == 8
00215             } else {
00216                  fprintf(stderr, "LDC2_W index = %u value = %f\n",
00217                         load_uint16_un(pc + 1),
00218                         cp_get_double(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)));
00219             }
00220             break;
00221 
00222         case ILOAD:
00223             fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00224             break;
00225 
00226         case LLOAD:
00227             fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00228             break;
00229 
00230         case FLOAD:
00231             fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00232             break;
00233 
00234         case DLOAD:
00235             fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00236             break;
00237 
00238         case ALOAD:
00239             fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00240             break;
00241 
00242         case ILOAD_0:
00243             fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD_0\n");
00244             break;
00245 
00246         case ILOAD_1:
00247             fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD_1\n");
00248             break;
00249 
00250         case ILOAD_2:
00251             fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD_2\n");
00252             break;
00253 
00254         case ILOAD_3:
00255             fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD_3\n");
00256             break;
00257 
00258         case LLOAD_0:
00259             fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD_0\n");
00260             break;
00261 
00262         case LLOAD_1:
00263             fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD_1\n");
00264             break;
00265 
00266         case LLOAD_2:
00267             fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD_2\n");
00268             break;
00269 
00270         case LLOAD_3:
00271             fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD_3\n");
00272             break;
00273 
00274         case FLOAD_0:
00275             fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD_0\n");
00276             break;
00277 
00278         case FLOAD_1:
00279             fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD_1\n");
00280             break;
00281 
00282         case FLOAD_2:
00283             fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD_2\n");
00284             break;
00285 
00286         case FLOAD_3:
00287             fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD_3\n");
00288             break;
00289 
00290         case DLOAD_0:
00291             fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD_0\n");
00292             break;
00293 
00294         case DLOAD_1:
00295             fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD_1\n");
00296             break;
00297 
00298         case DLOAD_2:
00299             fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD_2\n");
00300             break;
00301 
00302         case DLOAD_3:
00303             fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD_3\n");
00304             break;
00305 
00306         case ALOAD_0:
00307             fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD_0\n");
00308             break;
00309 
00310         case ALOAD_1:
00311             fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD_1\n");
00312             break;
00313 
00314         case ALOAD_2:
00315             fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD_2\n");
00316             break;
00317 
00318         case ALOAD_3:
00319             fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD_3\n");
00320             break;
00321 
00322         case IALOAD:
00323             fprintf(stderr, "IALOAD\n");
00324             break;
00325 
00326         case LALOAD:
00327             fprintf(stderr, "LALOAD\n");
00328             break;
00329 
00330         case FALOAD:
00331             fprintf(stderr, "FALOAD\n");
00332             break;
00333 
00334         case DALOAD:
00335             fprintf(stderr, "DALOAD\n");
00336             break;
00337 
00338         case AALOAD:
00339             fprintf(stderr, "AALOAD\n");
00340             break;
00341 
00342         case BALOAD:
00343             fprintf(stderr, "BALOAD\n");
00344             break;
00345 
00346         case CALOAD:
00347             fprintf(stderr, "CALOAD\n");
00348             break;
00349 
00350         case SALOAD:
00351             fprintf(stderr, "SALOAD\n");
00352             break;
00353 
00354         case ISTORE:
00355             fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00356             break;
00357 
00358         case LSTORE:
00359             fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00360             break;
00361 
00362         case FSTORE:
00363             fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00364             break;
00365 
00366         case DSTORE:
00367             fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00368             break;
00369 
00370         case ASTORE:
00371             fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE index = %u\n", *(pc + 1));
00372             break;
00373 
00374         case ISTORE_0:
00375             fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE_0\n");
00376             break;
00377 
00378         case ISTORE_1:
00379             fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE_1\n");
00380             break;
00381 
00382         case ISTORE_2:
00383             fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE_2\n");
00384             break;
00385 
00386         case ISTORE_3:
00387             fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE_3\n");
00388             break;
00389 
00390         case LSTORE_0:
00391             fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE_0\n");
00392             break;
00393 
00394         case LSTORE_1:
00395             fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE_1\n");
00396             break;
00397 
00398         case LSTORE_2:
00399             fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE_2\n");
00400             break;
00401 
00402         case LSTORE_3:
00403             fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE_3\n");
00404             break;
00405 
00406         case FSTORE_0:
00407             fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE_0\n");
00408             break;
00409 
00410         case FSTORE_1:
00411             fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE_1\n");
00412             break;
00413 
00414         case FSTORE_2:
00415             fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE_2\n");
00416             break;
00417 
00418         case FSTORE_3:
00419             fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE_3\n");
00420             break;
00421 
00422         case DSTORE_0:
00423             fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE_0\n");
00424             break;
00425 
00426         case DSTORE_1:
00427             fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE_1\n");
00428             break;
00429 
00430         case DSTORE_2:
00431             fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE_2\n");
00432             break;
00433 
00434         case DSTORE_3:
00435             fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE_3\n");
00436             break;
00437 
00438         case ASTORE_0:
00439             fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE_0\n");
00440             break;
00441 
00442         case ASTORE_1:
00443             fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE_1\n");
00444             break;
00445 
00446         case ASTORE_2:
00447             fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE_2\n");
00448             break;
00449 
00450         case ASTORE_3:
00451             fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE_3\n");
00452             break;
00453 
00454         case IASTORE:
00455             fprintf(stderr, "IASTORE\n");
00456             break;
00457 
00458         case LASTORE:
00459             fprintf(stderr, "LASTORE\n");
00460             break;
00461 
00462         case FASTORE:
00463             fprintf(stderr, "FASTORE\n");
00464             break;
00465 
00466         case DASTORE:
00467             fprintf(stderr, "DASTORE\n");
00468             break;
00469 
00470         case AASTORE:
00471             fprintf(stderr, "AASTORE\n");
00472             break;
00473 
00474         case BASTORE:
00475             fprintf(stderr, "BASTORE\n");
00476             break;
00477 
00478         case CASTORE:
00479             fprintf(stderr, "CASTORE\n");
00480             break;
00481 
00482         case SASTORE:
00483             fprintf(stderr, "SASTORE\n");
00484             break;
00485 
00486         case POP:
00487             fprintf(stderr, "POP\n");
00488             break;
00489 
00490         case POP2:
00491             fprintf(stderr, "POP2\n");
00492             break;
00493 
00494         case DUP:
00495             fprintf(stderr, "DUP\n");
00496             break;
00497 
00498         case DUP_X1:
00499             fprintf(stderr, "DUP_X1\n");
00500             break;
00501 
00502         case DUP_X2:
00503             fprintf(stderr, "DUP_X2\n");
00504             break;
00505 
00506         case DUP2:
00507             fprintf(stderr, "DUP2\n");
00508             break;
00509 
00510         case DUP2_X1:
00511             fprintf(stderr, "DUP2_X1\n");
00512             break;
00513 
00514         case DUP2_X2:
00515             fprintf(stderr, "DUP2_X2\n");
00516             break;
00517 
00518         case SWAP:
00519             fprintf(stderr, "SWAP\n");
00520             break;
00521 
00522         case IADD:
00523             fprintf(stderr, "IADD\n");
00524             break;
00525 
00526         case LADD:
00527             fprintf(stderr, "LADD\n");
00528             break;
00529 
00530         case FADD:
00531             fprintf(stderr, "FADD\n");
00532             break;
00533 
00534         case DADD:
00535             fprintf(stderr, "DADD\n");
00536             break;
00537 
00538         case ISUB:
00539             fprintf(stderr, "ISUB\n");
00540             break;
00541 
00542         case LSUB:
00543             fprintf(stderr, "LSUB\n");
00544             break;
00545 
00546         case FSUB:
00547             fprintf(stderr, "FSUB\n");
00548             break;
00549 
00550         case DSUB:
00551             fprintf(stderr, "DSUB\n");
00552             break;
00553 
00554         case IMUL:
00555             fprintf(stderr, "IMUL\n");
00556             break;
00557 
00558         case LMUL:
00559             fprintf(stderr, "LMUL\n");
00560             break;
00561 
00562         case FMUL:
00563             fprintf(stderr, "FMUL\n");
00564             break;
00565 
00566         case DMUL:
00567             fprintf(stderr, "DMUL\n");
00568             break;
00569 
00570         case IDIV:
00571             fprintf(stderr, "IDIV\n");
00572             break;
00573 
00574         case LDIV:
00575             fprintf(stderr, "LDIV\n");
00576             break;
00577 
00578         case FDIV:
00579             fprintf(stderr, "FDIV\n");
00580             break;
00581 
00582         case DDIV:
00583             fprintf(stderr, "DDIV\n");
00584             break;
00585 
00586         case IREM:
00587             fprintf(stderr, "IREM\n");
00588             break;
00589 
00590         case LREM:
00591             fprintf(stderr, "LREM\n");
00592             break;
00593 
00594         case FREM:
00595             fprintf(stderr, "FREM\n");
00596             break;
00597 
00598         case DREM:
00599             fprintf(stderr, "DREM\n");
00600             break;
00601 
00602         case INEG:
00603             fprintf(stderr, "INEG\n");
00604             break;
00605 
00606         case LNEG:
00607             fprintf(stderr, "LNEG\n");
00608             break;
00609 
00610         case FNEG:
00611             fprintf(stderr, "FNEG\n");
00612             break;
00613 
00614         case DNEG:
00615             fprintf(stderr, "DNEG\n");
00616             break;
00617 
00618         case ISHL:
00619             fprintf(stderr, "ISHL\n");
00620             break;
00621 
00622         case LSHL:
00623             fprintf(stderr, "LSHL\n");
00624             break;
00625 
00626         case ISHR:
00627             fprintf(stderr, "ISHR\n");
00628             break;
00629 
00630         case LSHR:
00631             fprintf(stderr, "LSHR\n");
00632             break;
00633 
00634         case IUSHR:
00635             fprintf(stderr, "IUSHR\n");
00636             break;
00637 
00638         case LUSHR:
00639             fprintf(stderr, "LUSHR\n");
00640             break;
00641 
00642         case IAND:
00643             fprintf(stderr, "IAND\n");
00644             break;
00645 
00646         case LAND:
00647             fprintf(stderr, "LAND\n");
00648             break;
00649 
00650         case IOR:
00651             fprintf(stderr, "IOR\n");
00652             break;
00653 
00654         case LOR:
00655             fprintf(stderr, "LOR\n");
00656             break;
00657 
00658         case IXOR:
00659             fprintf(stderr, "IXOR\n");
00660             break;
00661 
00662         case LXOR:
00663             fprintf(stderr, "LXOR\n");
00664             break;
00665 
00666         case IINC:
00667             fprintf(stderr, "IINC index = %u increment = %d\n", *(pc + 1),
00668                     (int32_t) *(pc + 2));
00669             break;
00670 
00671         case I2L:
00672             fprintf(stderr, "I2L\n");
00673             break;
00674 
00675         case I2F:
00676             fprintf(stderr, "I2F\n");
00677             break;
00678 
00679         case I2D:
00680             fprintf(stderr, "I2D\n");
00681             break;
00682 
00683         case L2I:
00684             fprintf(stderr, "L2I\n");
00685             break;
00686 
00687         case L2F:
00688             fprintf(stderr, "L2F\n");
00689             break;
00690 
00691         case L2D:
00692             fprintf(stderr, "L2D\n");
00693             break;
00694 
00695         case F2I:
00696             fprintf(stderr, "F2I\n");
00697             break;
00698 
00699         case F2L:
00700             fprintf(stderr, "F2L\n");
00701             break;
00702 
00703         case F2D:
00704             fprintf(stderr, "F2D\n");
00705             break;
00706 
00707         case D2I:
00708             fprintf(stderr, "D2I\n");
00709             break;
00710 
00711         case D2L:
00712             fprintf(stderr, "D2L\n");
00713             break;
00714 
00715         case D2F:
00716             fprintf(stderr, "D2F\n");
00717             break;
00718 
00719         case I2B:
00720             fprintf(stderr, "I2B\n");
00721             break;
00722 
00723         case I2C:
00724             fprintf(stderr, "I2C\n");
00725             break;
00726 
00727         case I2S:
00728             fprintf(stderr, "I2S\n");
00729             break;
00730 
00731         case LCMP:
00732             fprintf(stderr, "LCMP\n");
00733             break;
00734 
00735         case FCMPL:
00736             fprintf(stderr, "FCMPL\n");
00737             break;
00738 
00739         case FCMPG:
00740             fprintf(stderr, "FCMPG\n");
00741             break;
00742 
00743         case DCMPL:
00744             fprintf(stderr, "DCMPL\n");
00745             break;
00746 
00747         case DCMPG:
00748             fprintf(stderr, "DCMPG\n");
00749             break;
00750 
00751         case IFEQ:
00752             fprintf(stderr, "IFEQ offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00753             break;
00754 
00755         case IFNE:
00756             fprintf(stderr, "IFNE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00757             break;
00758 
00759         case IFLT:
00760             fprintf(stderr, "IFLT offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00761             break;
00762 
00763         case IFGE:
00764             fprintf(stderr, "IFGE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00765             break;
00766 
00767         case IFGT:
00768             fprintf(stderr, "IFGT offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00769             break;
00770 
00771         case IFLE:
00772             fprintf(stderr, "IFLE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00773             break;
00774 
00775         case IF_ICMPEQ:
00776             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPEQ offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00777             break;
00778 
00779         case IF_ICMPNE:
00780             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPNE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00781             break;
00782 
00783         case IF_ICMPLT:
00784             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPLT offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00785             break;
00786 
00787         case IF_ICMPGE:
00788             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPGE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00789             break;
00790 
00791         case IF_ICMPGT:
00792             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPGT offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00793             break;
00794 
00795         case IF_ICMPLE:
00796             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ICMPLE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00797             break;
00798 
00799         case IF_ACMPEQ:
00800             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ACMPEQ offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00801             break;
00802 
00803         case IF_ACMPNE:
00804             fprintf(stderr, "IF_ACMPNE offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00805             break;
00806 
00807         case GOTO:
00808             fprintf(stderr, "GOTO offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
00809             break;
00810 
00811         case LDC_REF:
00812         {
00813             uintptr_t ref = cp_get_ref(cp, *(pc + 1));
00814             java_lang_String_t *jstring;
00815             java_lang_Class_t *jclass;
00816 
00817             if (cp_get_tag(cp, *(pc + 1)) == CONSTANT_Class) {
00818                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC_REF CONSTANT_Class ");
00819                 jclass = JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(ref);
00820                 jstring_print(JAVA_LANG_STRING_REF2PTR(jclass->name));
00821             } else { // CONSTANT_String
00822                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC_REF CONSTANT_String ");
00823                 jstring = JAVA_LANG_STRING_REF2PTR(ref);
00824                 jstring_print(jstring);
00825             }
00826 
00827             fprintf(stderr, "\n");
00828         }
00829             break;
00830 
00831         case LDC_W_REF:
00832         {
00833             uintptr_t ref = cp_get_ref(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00834             java_lang_String_t *jstring;
00835             java_lang_Class_t *jclass;
00836 
00837             if (cp_get_tag(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1)) == CONSTANT_Class) {
00838                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC_REF CONSTANT_Class ");
00839                 jclass = JAVA_LANG_CLASS_REF2PTR(ref);
00840                 jstring_print(JAVA_LANG_STRING_REF2PTR(jclass->name));
00841             } else { // CONSTANT_String
00842                 fprintf(stderr, "LDC_REF CONSTANT_String ");
00843                 jstring = JAVA_LANG_STRING_REF2PTR(ref);
00844                 jstring_print(jstring);
00845             }
00846 
00847             fprintf(stderr, "\n");
00848         }
00849             break;
00850 
00851         case TABLESWITCH:
00852             fprintf(stderr, "TABLESWITCH\n");
00853             break;
00854 
00855         case LOOKUPSWITCH:
00856             fprintf(stderr, "LOOKUPSWITCH\n");
00857             break;
00858 
00859         case IRETURN:
00860             fprintf(stderr, "IRETURN\n");
00861             break;
00862 
00863         case LRETURN:
00864             fprintf(stderr, "LRETURN\n");
00865             break;
00866 
00867         case FRETURN:
00868             fprintf(stderr, "FRETURN\n");
00869             break;
00870 
00871         case DRETURN:
00872             fprintf(stderr, "DRETURN\n");
00873             break;
00874 
00875         case ARETURN:
00876             fprintf(stderr, "ARETURN\n");
00877             break;
00878 
00879         case RETURN:
00880             fprintf(stderr, "RETURN\n");
00881             break;
00882 
00883         case GETSTATIC_PRELINK:
00884             fprintf(stderr, "GETSTATIC\n");
00885             break;
00886 
00887         case PUTSTATIC_PRELINK:
00888             fprintf(stderr, "PUTSTATIC\n");
00889             break;
00890 
00891         case GETFIELD_PRELINK:
00892             fprintf(stderr, "GETFIELD\n");
00893             break;
00894 
00895         case PUTFIELD_PRELINK:
00896             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD\n");
00897             break;
00898 
00899         case INVOKEVIRTUAL: // TODO: Improve
00900         {
00901             uint16_t index = method_unpack_index(load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00902             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKEVIRTUAL index = %u\n", index);
00903         }
00904             break;
00905 
00906         case INVOKESPECIAL: // TODO: Improve
00907         {
00908             uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
00909             method_t *method = cp_get_resolved_method(cp, index);
00910 
00911             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKESPECIAL class = %s name = %s desc =%s\n",
00912                     cp_get_class(method->cp)->name, method->name,
00913                     method->descriptor);
00914         }
00915             break;
00916 
00917         case INVOKESTATIC: // TODO: Improve
00918         {
00919             uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
00920             method_t *method = cp_get_resolved_method(cp, index);
00921 
00922             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKESTATIC class = %s name = %s desc =%s\n",
00923                     cp_get_class(method->cp)->name, method->name,
00924                     method->descriptor);
00925         }
00926             break;
00927 
00928         case INVOKEINTERFACE: // TODO: Improve
00929         {
00930             uint16_t index = method_unpack_index(load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00931             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKEINTERFACE index = %u\n", index);
00932         }
00933             break;
00934 
00935         case NEW: // TODO: Improve
00936             fprintf(stderr, "NEW index = %u\n", load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00937             break;
00938 
00939         case NEWARRAY:
00940             fprintf(stderr, "NEWARRAY type = ");
00941 
00942             switch (*(pc + 1)) {
00943                 case T_BOOLEAN: fprintf(stderr, "T_BOOLEAN\n"); break;
00944                 case T_CHAR:    fprintf(stderr, "T_CHAR\n");    break;
00945 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00946                 case T_FLOAT:   fprintf(stderr, "T_FLOAT\n");   break;
00947                 case T_DOUBLE:  fprintf(stderr, "T_DOUBLE\n");  break;
00948 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00949                 case T_BYTE:    fprintf(stderr, "T_BYTE\n");    break;
00950                 case T_SHORT:   fprintf(stderr, "T_SHORT\n");   break;
00951                 case T_INT:     fprintf(stderr, "T_INT\n");     break;
00952                 case T_LONG:    fprintf(stderr, "T_LONG\n");    break;
00953                 default:        dbg_unreachable();
00954             }
00955 
00956             break;
00957 
00958         case ANEWARRAY: // TODO: Improve
00959             fprintf(stderr, "ANEWARRAY index = %u\n", load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00960             break;
00961 
00962         case ARRAYLENGTH:
00963             fprintf(stderr, "ARRAYLENGTH\n");
00964             break;
00965 
00966         case ATHROW: // TODO: Improve
00967             fprintf(stderr, "ATHROW\n");
00968             break;
00969 
00970         case CHECKCAST: // TODO: Improve
00971         {
00972             uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
00973             fprintf(stderr, "CHECKCAST index = %u\n", index);
00974         }
00975             break;
00976 
00977         case INSTANCEOF: // TODO: Improve
00978         {
00979             uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
00980             fprintf(stderr, "INSTANCEOF index = %u\n", index);
00981         }
00982             break;
00983 
00984         case MONITORENTER:
00985             fprintf(stderr, "MONITORENTER\n");
00986             break;
00987 
00988         case MONITOREXIT:
00989             fprintf(stderr, "MONITOREXIT\n");
00990             break;
00991 
00992         case WIDE:
00993         {
00994             uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
00995 
00996             fprintf(stderr, "WIDE ");
00997 
00998             switch (*(pc + 1)) {
00999                 case ILOAD:
01000                     fprintf(stderr, "ILOAD index = %u\n", index);
01001                     break;
01002 
01003                 case FLOAD:
01004                     fprintf(stderr, "FLOAD index = %u\n", index);
01005                     break;
01006 
01007                 case ALOAD:
01008                     fprintf(stderr, "ALOAD index = %u\n", index);
01009                     break;
01010 
01011                 case LLOAD:
01012                     fprintf(stderr, "LLOAD index = %u\n", index);
01013                     break;
01014 
01015                 case DLOAD:
01016                     fprintf(stderr, "DLOAD index = %u\n", index);
01017                     break;
01018 
01019                 case ISTORE:
01020                     fprintf(stderr, "ISTORE index = %u\n", index);
01021                     break;
01022 
01023                 case FSTORE:
01024                     fprintf(stderr, "FSTORE index = %u\n", index);
01025                     break;
01026 
01027                 case ASTORE:
01028                     fprintf(stderr, "ASTORE index = %u\n", index);
01029                     break;
01030 
01031                 case LSTORE:
01032                     fprintf(stderr, "LSTORE index = %u\n", index);
01033                     break;
01034 
01035                 case DSTORE:
01036                     fprintf(stderr, "DSTORE index = %u\n", index);
01037                     break;
01038 
01039                 case IINC:
01040                     fprintf(stderr, "IINC index = %u increment = %d\n", index,
01041                             (int32_t) load_int16_un(pc + 4));
01042                     break;
01043 
01044                 case METHOD_LOAD: // TODO: Improve
01045                     fprintf(stderr, "METHOD_LOAD\n");
01046                     break;
01047 
01048                 case METHOD_ABSTRACT: // TODO: Improve
01049                     fprintf(stderr, "METHOD_ABSTRACT\n");
01050                     break;
01051 
01052                 case INVOKE_NATIVE: // TODO: Improve
01053                     fprintf(stderr, "INVOKE_NATIVE\n");
01054                     break;
01055 
01056                 case HALT:
01057                     fprintf(stderr, "HALT\n");
01058                     break;
01059 
01060                 default:
01061                     dbg_unreachable();
01062             }
01063                 break;
01064 
01065         case MULTIANEWARRAY:
01066             fprintf(stderr, "MULTIANEWARRAY\n");
01067             break;
01068 
01069         case IFNULL:
01070             fprintf(stderr, "IFNULL offset = %d\n", load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01071             break;
01072 
01073         case IFNONNULL:
01074             fprintf(stderr, "IFNONNULL offset = %d\n",
01075                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01076             break;
01077 
01078         case GOTO_W:
01079             fprintf(stderr, "GOTO_W offset = %d\n", load_int32_un(pc + 1));
01080             break;
01081 
01082         case GETSTATIC_BYTE:
01083         // case GETSTATIC_BOOL:
01084             fprintf(stderr, "GETSTATIC_BYTE/BOOL offset = %d\n",
01085                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01086             break;
01087 
01088         case GETSTATIC_CHAR:
01089             fprintf(stderr, "GETSTATIC_CHAR offset = %d\n",
01090                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01091             break;

01095                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));

01212             break;

01215             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_BOOL offset = %d\n",
01216                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01217             break;
01218 
01219         case PUTFIELD_CHAR:
01220         // case PUTFIELD_SHORT:
01221             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_CHAR/SHORT offset = %d\n",
01222                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01223             break;
01224 
01225         case PUTFIELD_INT:
01226             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_INT offset = %d\n",
01227                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01228             break;
01229 
01230         case PUTFIELD_FLOAT:
01231             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_FLOAT offset = %d\n",
01232                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01233             break;
01234 
01235         case PUTFIELD_LONG:
01236             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_LONG offset = %d\n",
01237                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01238             break;
01239 
01240         case PUTFIELD_DOUBLE:
01241             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_DOUBLE offset = %d\n",
01242                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01243             break;
01244 
01245         case PUTFIELD_REFERENCE:
01246             fprintf(stderr, "PUTFIELD_REFERENCE offset = %d\n",
01247                     load_int16_un(pc + 1));
01248             break;
01249 
01250         case INVOKESUPER:
01251             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKESUPER\n");
01252             break;
01253 
01254         case INVOKEVIRTUAL_PRELINK:
01255             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKEVIRTUAL_PRELINK\n");
01256             break;
01257 
01258         case INVOKESPECIAL_PRELINK:
01259             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKESPECIAL_PRELINK\n");
01260             break;
01261 
01262         case INVOKESTATIC_PRELINK:
01263             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKESTATIC_PRELINK\n");
01264             break;
01265 
01266         case INVOKEINTERFACE_PRELINK:
01267             fprintf(stderr, "INVOKEINTERFACE_PRELINK\n");
01268             break;
01269 
01270         case NEW_PRELINK:
01271             fprintf(stderr, "NEW_PRELINK\n");
01272             break;
01273 
01274 
01275         case NEWARRAY_PRELINK:
01276             fprintf(stderr, "NEWARRAY_PRELINK type = ");
01277 
01278             switch (*(pc + 1)) {
01279                 case T_BOOLEAN: fprintf(stderr, "T_BOOLEAN\n"); break;
01280                 case T_CHAR:    fprintf(stderr, "T_CHAR\n");    break;
01281 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01282                 case T_FLOAT:   fprintf(stderr, "T_FLOAT\n");   break;
01283                 case T_DOUBLE:  fprintf(stderr, "T_DOUBLE\n");  break;
01284 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01285                 case T_BYTE:    fprintf(stderr, "T_BYTE\n");    break;
01286                 case T_SHORT:   fprintf(stderr, "T_SHORT\n");   break;
01287                 case T_INT:     fprintf(stderr, "T_INT\n");     break;
01288                 case T_LONG:    fprintf(stderr, "T_LONG\n");    break;
01289                 default:        dbg_unreachable();
01290             }
01291 
01292             break;
01293 
01294         case ANEWARRAY_PRELINK:
01295             fprintf(stderr, "ANEWARRAY_PRELINK\n");
01296             break;
01297 
01298         case CHECKCAST_PRELINK:
01299             fprintf(stderr, "CHECKCAST_PRELINK\n");
01300             break;
01301 
01302         case INSTANCEOF_PRELINK:
01303             fprintf(stderr, "INSTANCEOF_PRELINK\n");
01304             break;
01305 
01306         case MULTIANEWARRAY_PRELINK:
01307             fprintf(stderr, "MULTIANEWARRAY_PRELINK\n");
01308             break;
01309 
01310         case MONITORENTER_SPECIAL:
01311             fprintf(stderr, "MONITORENTER_SPECIAL\n");
01312             break;
01313 
01314         case MONITORENTER_SPECIAL_STATIC:
01315             fprintf(stderr, "MONITORENTER_SPECIAL_STATIC\n");
01316             break;
01317 
01318         case IRETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01319             fprintf(stderr, "IRETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01320             break;
01321 
01322         case LRETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01323             fprintf(stderr, "LRETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01324             break;
01325 
01326         case FRETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01327             fprintf(stderr, "FRETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01328             break;
01329 
01330         case DRETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01331             fprintf(stderr, "DRETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01332             break;
01333 
01334         case ARETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01335             fprintf(stderr, "ARETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01336             break;
01337 
01338         case RETURN_MONITOREXIT:
01339             fprintf(stderr, "RETURN_MONITOREXIT\n");
01340             break;
01341 
01342         case NEW_FINALIZER: // TODO: Improve
01343             fprintf(stderr, "NEW_FINALIZER index = %u\n",
01344                     load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
01345             break;
01346 
01347         case LDC_PRELINK:
01348             fprintf(stderr, "LDC_PRELINK\n");
01349             break;
01350 
01351         case LDC_W_PRELINK:
01352             fprintf(stderr, "LDC_W_PRELINK\n");
01353             break;
01354 
01355         default:
01356             fprintf(stderr, "UNKNOWN OPCODE\n");
01357             abort();
01358         }
01359     }
01360 } // print_bytecode()
01361 
01362 #endif // JEL_PRINT
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:26 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
